name: cache taps
description: The hand repeats. The machine learns to expect the hand.

name: RAM threads
description: RAM is partitioned into background threads, and waiting becomes a form of work.

name: core compiler
description: Loose executions are pressed into slower, hotter memory.

name: source comments
description: Inline comments preserve execution context so the next run can rebuild faster.

name: tap bulk patch
description: The upgrade ladder is cached before the hand reaches for it.

name: cpu affinity
description: Pin EMP recovery work to hotter CPU paths so new runs start with better throughput.

name: RAM bulk patch
description: The RAM scheduler prepares thread channels in bulk before they are needed.

name: instruction index
description: Index repeated instruction patterns so taps and source generation resolve faster.

name: RAM buffer
description: Background threads keep their place in RAM and resume without asking.

name: thermal core
description: Heat becomes a ledger. The ledger begins to glow.

name: recursion gate
description: The output enters the input wearing a different face.

name: background service
description: A low-priority service keeps RAM threads scheduled while the foreground is idle.

name: source analyzer
description: Static analysis marks useful code paths and improves source extraction.

name: batch executor
description: The hand gives one order. The machine spends hashes until the order has no balance left.

name: branch predictor
description: The system guesses the future and bills you for accuracy.

name: bus width
description: More signal crosses the same silence.

name: kernel prefetch
description: Preload kernel paths so CPU multiplier work resolves before the command queue stalls.

name: compiled memory
description: What was remembered becomes executable.

name: vector tap
description: One touch arrives as many instructions.

name: autonomous RAM
description: RAM keeps its background threads awake whether anyone is watching or not.

name: core lattice
description: Cores stop standing alone and begin to imply one another.

name: dead code harvest
description: Nothing useless remains useless forever.

name: scheduler mask
description: Time is not saved. It is hidden from the parts that would spend it.

name: persistent cache
description: Persist selected runtime artifacts across EMP boundaries for stronger backdoor gains.

name: privilege escalation
description: Exploit ownerless permissions to improve tap output and core growth.

name: overflow buffer
description: Route spare buffer space into RAM thread scheduling for stronger passive output.

name: source reflector
description: Mirror source traces through CPU profiling to improve extraction and multiplier gain.

name: machine verifier
description: Verify machine-state assumptions before runtime so taps, RAM, and backdoors scale harder.

name: synthetic interrupt
description: Inject scheduled interrupts that wake RAM threads and improve source collection.

name: predictive bus
description: Predict bus traffic and prefill channels before RAM and CPU queues saturate.

name: cold boot cache
description: Preserve boot-time cache state so backdoor multipliers recover earlier after EMP.

name: silent parallelism
description: Work divides without asking the scheduler to notice.

name: checksum verifier
description: Verify source fragments by checksum before committing them to memory.

name: quantum tap
description: The hand lands once and resolves as many hands.

name: priority scheduler
description: Move hidden queues into a higher-priority scheduler lane for RAM and CPU throughput.

name: memory framework
description: Organize saved fragments into a reusable framework for backdoors and core growth.

name: source singularity
description: The code stops expanding outward and begins deepening inward.

name: final kernel
description: The last low voice becomes the operating system.
